message:
harden(cli): extend terminal sanitization to defer/undefer status + stale issue ID outputs

Follow-on to 54a03a00, which sanitized issue IDs and dependency types
across show/comments/create/epic/update. Two more output paths were
still echoing untrusted strings through the rich renderer and plain
println without filtering control bytes:

- defer/undefer rich renderers were appending DeferredIssue.previous_status
  and SkippedIssue.status straight into the styled Text without
  sanitization. status is user-influenced via the issue lifecycle and
  could carry CSI/OSC/BEL bytes (the same risk that motivated the
  earlier hardening sweep). Add a status_text helper that runs
  sanitize_terminal_inline, and route both render_defer_rich's "Status:
  X" line and render_undefer_rich's "Status: X → Y" arrow line through
  it.
- stale's plain output already sanitized issue.title and the optional
  assignee but printed issue.id raw in both the assignee and
  no-assignee println branches. The rich renderer had the same gap on
  the styled issue_id field. Add stale_display_text helper, route both
  println branches and the rich line through it.

Both hardenings include the standard regression test pattern: feed in
a string with CSI 2J / OSC 52 / BEL / CR / BS / 0x9B and assert the
rendered output contains no raw control bytes and the expected escaped
\\u{...} forms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
